name: Use of a Non-reentrant Function in a Concurrent Context
description: The product invokes a non-reentrant function within a concurrent environment where competing code sequences such as threads or signal handlers may call the same function or alter its shared state, leading to data corruption or undefined behavior.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[non_reentrant_function] node is reachable from multiple concurrent CONTROL[thread] or CONTROL[signal_handler] paths without CONTROL[lock] or CONTROL[mutex] serializing access
